meta.title: Pricing - VidFab | Simple AI Video Plans
meta.description: Simple, transparent pricing for AI video generation. Choose the plan that fits your needs.

title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
subtitle: Choose the plan that's right for you and start creating amazing AI videos.

free.name: Free
free.description: Get started with AI video creation — simple and risk-free.

pro.name: Pro Plan
pro.description: Advanced video production suite for professionals and studios.

premium.name: Premium
premium.description: For organizations that need the most powerful video creation capabilities.

items.question: Can I change plans later?
items.answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. When upgrading, credits are added to your account immediately.

items.question: What occurs if I exceed my allocated monthly credits?
items.intro: If you use up all your monthly credits:
bullets: You'll be prompted to upgrade to a higher plan.
Video generation will be unavailable until your credits are renewed or your plan is upgraded.

items.question: How do credits work?
items.intro: Credits are used up based on the AI model and video settings you select. For example:
items.outro: Higher resolution or longer videos use more credits. Different AI models may also have varying credit requirements.

items.question: Which payment methods are available?
items.answer: We accept all major credit cards through Stripe. Annual plans also provide additional savings compared to monthly billing.
